hero.name: Blank!
hero.thirdMessage: I bring your ideas to life in code!

aboutMe.me: My name Nikita Shipunov, I'm 19 and currently a 3rd-year student at Voenmeh (Baltic State Technical University).
aboutMe.firstText: A backend developer at heart (frontend developer by appearance) and a clean architecture enthusiast.
aboutMe.secondText: In programming, I value system integrity and elegance; in life, I appreciate creative approaches and complex mechanics. Whether it's building intricate modpacks in Minecraft with Avarita or automating production chains in sandbox games — I thrive on processes where simple building blocks evolve into something complex and fully functional.
aboutMe.thirdText: Currently, I'm diving deep into the Node.js ecosystem, as I consider it the perfect blend of flexibility and structure for tackling demanding enterprise challenges. I design and maintain my own projects from scratch, always prioritizing clean architecture and long-term scalability.
